name: modelcontextprotocol/servers
license_summary: Project is in an MIT-to-Apache-2.0 transition; documentation contributions excluding specifications are CC-BY-4.0.
why_relevant: Official high-signal MCP reference implementation source.
Useful for Skills catalog/risk metadata around reference-server disclaimers and threat-model boundaries.
Useful as a source for original defensive guidance on MCP server review without copying implementation content.
redistribution_boundary: Do not copy server implementation code, executable snippets, or configuration examples into package-facing skills. Future normalization may create original safety heuristics and review checklists with attribution.
next_allowed_action: Create a bounded normalization ticket for original MCP source-review and threat-model patterns only if it outranks backlog cleanup.
